title: Turn comments back on FOR KIDS

transcript.text: Hello, living in Boulder V-Log. It's 3.13 p.m. on February 29th, 2020.
I thought yesterday was going to be the last day, but it's 29th, so I guess it's a leap year.
I'm really high right now. I still have my weed from when I got it from before,
My roommate. I think I got it before I took those four days off, and then I was glad I
Had it done, but like when you're tired, it helps you motivate. But yeah, yesterday was the first
Day where I was trying to get back into the swing things again, exercising, and I got up to a really
Late start because I had insomnia really late, and then I rode my bike 48 miles. Then my mom
Called me and wanted me to do business, go stuff with her, and got kind of ate up the rest of the
Day, and then we went out to eat with my roommate. And then I had insomnia all night last night, so
I got up to a really late start today, and I rode my bike inside, but then I realized it was warm
Outside. I could have ridden outside. I didn't even think about it. I just thought it was too cold. I'm
Not in the mood of riding in cold. So yeah, I'll try to do it tomorrow. I haven't checked the weather,
But if the weather's good, I'll ride outside for the first time. Yeah, it's probably too cold to go
Up in the mountains, I guess. But yeah, riding in the flats, and I'll take my time trail bike,
And that'll be fun to start really early and see what kind of range I can get if I fill up all the
Water bottles. That'll be really fun. And then also check out my bike computer. Yeah, that's what
I'll do tomorrow. So I'll ride my bike until eight then, until eight today, no matter how many miles
I go. I rode 26 miles, and then I took a break. I had three beers yesterday, and I've been smoking a lot
Of weed, and didn't really, haven't really been eating, so I didn't really have a lot of energy
Today. I didn't even really eat anything today. The only thing I had to eat was, I think, some grapes
That I got last night. Those were good. But I ate most of them last night. And then,
And then, what else? Yeah, just the goo. That's it. And protein drink, two protein drinks.
So I'll get it back on the bike, and if I get hungry, I'll just do goo until eight. And then
I'll have pasta for dinner. And then get up as early as I can and ride tomorrow. But so then I
Took a break, and then I came back and did 20. I did 26 miles, and then I did 22. So I did a total
Of 48 miles. So I'll get back on there, and I guess I can go another almost five hours. I think I'll get
Nice and high. I was listening to Polybius today while I was high, riding on the trainer. It was
Fun. I think I went through chapter six twice already today. Yeah, I'm gonna listen to all that
Stuff when they talk about the separation of powers. Polybius does it, and I'll read them,
And I'll, you know, put it when I wrote my thing, make the links to it, but, you know, in the
Federalist Papers and then on the Montesquieu. So, yeah, I'm gonna get back riding again. I think
I'll do whatever it takes to keep me going, taking music. But even when I'm not strong,
It's fun to ride. I'm sweating my ass off, so I know I'm losing weight. That's the only thing I
Really care about. I don't want to get out on that time trail bike outside. It's a really nice
Time trail bike and be fat. At least look good. Um, and, uh, but, but yeah, me being fat,
If I'm aero and I've got food forever, I can keep a pretty good pace probably on the flats. That's
What I'll do. Just do flats tomorrow. If it's nice. Okay, talk to you tomorrow.
